body:
This adds current implicit free surface code so we can discuss tidying and also tweak setups, agree on unit tests etc... Code runs with geostrophic adjust test e.g. this movie shows the implicit free surface v fully explicit approach for a small timestep.

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3535328/109848197-fcaca200-7c1d-11eb-96fa-a3e1e4400162.mp4

as expected the implicit free surface damps waves slightly, but otherwise works the same. 

Note - this needs some changes to bring in sync with spatial varying operators. It also has some extra grid terms that might be better in grid/operators somewhere etc...
title: Implicit free-surface code for discussion and then merging....
